description: Build and deploy one production web app to Vercel

userStories.title: Trend research + idea selection
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: Problem, Market, Target, Monetization, Competitors
At least 5 ideas evaluated, top 1 selected
userStories.notes: Selected DeepWork.fm - AI Focus Timer with Ambient Sounds. 5 ideas evaluated: AI Invoice Organizer, AI Resume Builder, AI Focus Timer, Habit Tracker, AI Meeting Summarizer.

userStories.title: Next.js scaffold + Supabase/Stripe integration
userStories.notes: Next.js 16.1.6 + Supabase + Stripe + PostHog + Sentry integrated. Build passes.

userStories.title: AppFactory Phase 0-4 (spec + design)
acceptanceCriteria: Phase 4: Axiom design system applied (#0a0a0a / Inter)
userStories.notes: spec.md created with Phase 0-4. Axiom design system applied. 4 pages, 5 ambient sounds, localStorage-first.

userStories.title: AppFactory Phase 5 (build)
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build succeeds with zero errors
userStories.notes: All 4 pages + API route built. Timer, SoundMixer, Stats, Pricing, Success. Responsive. Build passes with zero errors.

userStories.title: Quality gates (Phase 6-8)
userStories.notes: Build passes, LOCAL_RUN returns 200, RUN_CERTIFICATE.json created, SEO (sitemap.xml, robots.txt, OG/Twitter meta), zero TypeScript errors.

userStories.title: Vercel deploy
acceptanceCriteria: Vercel env vars set (Supabase, Stripe, PostHog, Sentry)
userStories.notes: Deployed to https://20260301-webapp.vercel.app. HTTP 200 confirmed. All env vars set.

userStories.title: Report + X post
acceptanceCriteria: Slack #metrics post with app name, URL, niche, build time
X post published via Postiz CLI
userStories.notes: Slack webhook sent (ok). X post created via Postiz CLI (postId: cmm7wl7970083ry0yy5suxxld).
